title: Zakat Calculator
knowledge_note: Zakat purifies wealth. 2.5% of savings above nisab goes to those in need. Computing zakat accurately helps millions of Muslims every year.
explanation: The 'use' keyword imports a module — a collection of built-in recipes. The finance module knows how to calculate zakat, profit, and more.
starter_code:
use finance
remember savings = 5000
remember nisab = 595
remember zakat = finance.zakat(wealth: savings, nisab: nisab)
say "Zakat due: " + zakat
worked_example:
use finance
remember savings = 5000
remember nisab = 595
remember zakat = finance.zakat(wealth: savings, nisab: nisab)
say "Zakat due: " + zakat
challenge: Change the savings amount and recalculate.
